menu_option_descriptions.scan: Search miners in the local subnet
menu_option_descriptions.manual: Connect directly to a miner by IP address
menu_option_descriptions.farm: One device with total hashrate, power, and emergency stop for linked miners

farm.title: Farm
farm.description: Pick miner devices already added to Home Assistant. Configure a power switch on each miner in integration options for emergency stop.

error.invalid_subnet: Invalid subnet. Use IPv4 CIDR like 192.168.1.0/24
error.farm_no_title: Enter a name for the farm
error.farm_no_devices: Select at least one miner device
error.farm_invalid_device: A selected device no longer exists
error.farm_only_miner_devices: Only individual miner devices can be added (not another farm)
error.farm_device_set_conflict: Another farm already uses this exact set of miners
error.invalid_temp_entity: Each entry must be an existing sensor entity

farm_options.title: Farm settings
farm_options.description: Up to 5 stratum presets per farm (each farm has its own list in its integration entry). Leave a slot's host empty to remove it. After save, presets are stored with the farm. In the worker field you can use per-miner IP tokens as documented in the integration README. On the farm device card, pick a preset and use Apply buttons.

pool_action.name: Stratum pool (all members)
pool_action.description: Leave unchanged, replace primary on each miner, or append a backup (max 3 pools each).

options.replace_primary: Set primary pool (host and port below)
options.append_backup: Add backup pool (host and port below)

init.title: Miner options
init.description: Power switch for the miner plug, and optional stratum pool changes (requires miner reachable).

pool_action.name: Stratum pool
pool_action.description: Leave unchanged, replace the primary slot, or add a backup (max 3 pools).

options.replace_primary: Set primary pool (host and port below)
options.append_backup: Add backup pool (host and port below)

error.farm_no_devices: Select at least one miner device
error.farm_invalid_device: A selected device no longer exists
error.farm_only_miner_devices: Only individual miner devices can be added (not another farm)
error.farm_device_set_conflict: Another farm already uses this exact set of miners
error.invalid_switch: The selected entity is missing or is not a switch
error.invalid_temp_entity: Each entry must be an existing sensor entity
error.pool_fields_required: Enter both stratum host and port for this action.
error.pool_apply_failed: The miner rejected the pool change or the backup limit was reached.
error.miner_offline: Cannot reach the miner; pool was not changed.
error.miner_not_loaded: Miner integration is not loaded; try again later.
error.farm_pool_mixed_algorithms: Members report different mining algorithms; set pools per miner or split the farm.
error.farm_pool_no_members: No linked miner coordinators for this farm.
error.farm_pool_apply_failed: Pool change failed on one or more miners (offline, rejected, or backup limit).
error.farm_pool_apply_slot_invalid: Choose a slot number that has a saved host and port.
error.farm_not_loaded: Farm is not loaded; try again later.

restart_backend.name: Restart mining on miner
restart_backend.description: Restarts the mining process on a miner.

set_work_mode.name: Set work mode on miner
set_work_mode.description: Sets the work mode (low, normal, high) on a miner.

set_pool.name: Set pool on miner
set_pool.description: Reorder existing pools, replace the primary stratum URL, or append a backup slot (mode append, max 3 pools).

set_farm_pool.name: Set pool on farm
set_farm_pool.description: Apply the same stratum primary (manual) or backup (append) to every miner on a farm device. Skipped when members report different algorithms.
